title: pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. krausei
intro: Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. krausei, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella kalksburgensis, is a rare and endangered type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. krausei include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. However, due to its rarity and limited availability, Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. krausei is typically prepared in herbal supplements or teas, which are available through select herbalists and online retailers.
